title: Sandi Bird Sanctuary
tagline: Sandi Bird Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Uttar Pradesh

overview.short: Sandi Bird Sanctuary is a bird sanctuary in Hardoi district of Uttar Pradesh, India.
overview.description: Sandi Bird Sanctuary is a bird sanctuary in Hardoi district of Uttar Pradesh, India. The sanctuary is located at a distance of 19 km on Hardoi-Sandi Road in Sandi in Hardoi district of Uttar Pradesh. Sandi Bird Sanctuary is 1 km from Sandi town on Main Road at Nawabganj, near Sandi Police Station of Hardoi district. Sandi Bird sanctuary was created in the year 1990 in order to protect the natural habitats and aquatic vegetation for the local residents and migratory birds.

topPlaces.name: Mohaddipur
topPlaces.description: Mohaddipur is a small village approximately 25 km from Bihar Sharif town in the Indian state of Bihar. The village has a population of approximately 2,000 as per the 2011 India census.

topPlaces.name: Dasauli
topPlaces.description: Dasauli is a village in Sandi block of Hardoi district, Uttar Pradesh, India. It is located 10 km away from Sandi, which is the nearest city.

topPlaces.name: Nikari
topPlaces.description: Nikari is a village in Sandi block of Hardoi district, Uttar Pradesh, India. It is located 8 km (5.0 mi) away from Sandi, which is the nearest city.

topPlaces.name: Lamkan
topPlaces.description: Lamkan is a village in Sandi block of Hardoi district, Uttar Pradesh, India. It is located 6 km away from Sandi, which is the nearest city.

topPlaces.name: Sandi, Uttar Pradesh
topPlaces.description: Sandi is a town and a nagar palika parishad in Bilgram tehsil of Hardoi district, Uttar Pradesh, India. It is located on the left bank of the Garra river, on the road from Hardoi to Fatehgarh.

items.note: Mohaddipur is a small village approximately 25 km from Bihar Sharif town in the Indian state of Bihar. The village has a population of approximately 2,000 as per the 2011 India census.
Dasauli is a village in Sandi block of Hardoi district, Uttar Pradesh, India. It is located 10 km away from Sandi, which is the nearest city.
Nikari is a village in Sandi block of Hardoi district, Uttar Pradesh, India. It is located 8 km (5.0 mi) away from Sandi, which is the nearest city.
Lamkan is a village in Sandi block of Hardoi district, Uttar Pradesh, India. It is located 6 km away from Sandi, which is the nearest city.
Sandi is a town and a nagar palika parishad in Bilgram tehsil of Hardoi district, Uttar Pradesh, India. It is located on the left bank of the Garra river, on the road from Hardoi to Fatehgarh.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sandi Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sandi Bird Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Sandi Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kanpur Airport (100 km) and the nearest railway station is Kanpur Central (98 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sandi Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sandi Bird Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sandi Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Sandi Bird Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sandi Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Mohaddipur, Dasauli, Nikari, Lamkan, Sandi, Uttar Pradesh.
